# GitHub Radar — 2026-06-01

## Act now
- A patched RCE advisory landed for a library we depend on. (axios, watchlist) [security]
- Our CI image base hit end-of-life; builds break next week. (acme/api, my-repos) [deprecation]

## Watch
- Next.js cut a release candidate with a new caching model. (vercel/next.js, starred) [release]
- A new local-first sync library is climbing the trending list. (some/sync-db, trending) [trending]

## What to ignore
- Hype thread claiming a framework is "dead" — opinion, not a verified change.

## Themes
- Supply-chain hygiene is this week's recurring thread across our deps.
